headline: Why Booking Holdings Inc. (BKNG) is One of the Most Undervalued Hotel Stocks to Invest In Now
summary: Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) is one of the most undervalued hotel stocks to invest in now. Bernstein cut the price target on Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) to $4,698 from $5,407 on March 11, reiterating a Market Perform rating on the shares and telling investors that, financially, fiscal Q4 marked a strong finish to 2025 for […]
